gpt_compound: EDC (5.75 g, 0.03 mol) and HOBt (2.43 g, 0.018 mol) were added to a solution of 10 (3.33 g, 0.015 mol) in dry CH2Cl2 (60 mL). Subsequently, a solution of isobutyl amine (2.20 g, 0.03 mol) in dry CH2Cl2 (20 mL) was added and the reaction mixture was stirred at r.t. for 3 h. After, a saturated solution of Na2CO3 was added and the aqueous phase was extracted with CH2Cl2 (3x)
